title: Electricity Cost Calculator - Estimate Your Bill
description: Free electricity cost calculator. Estimate your electricity bill based on appliance wattage, usage hours, and local rate. Save money on energy.
keywords: electricity cost calculator, energy cost calculator, power bill calculator, watt to cost, electricity usage calculator
intro: Calculate how much an appliance costs to run. Enter wattage, daily usage hours, and your electricity rate.

faq.a: Cost = (Watts × Hours per day × Days) / 1000 × Rate per kWh. Divide watts by 1000 to get kilowatts, then multiply by hours and rate.
A kilowatt-hour (kWh) is the energy used by a 1000-watt appliance running for 1 hour. It's the standard billing unit for electricity.

faq.q: How can I reduce electricity costs?
faq.a: Use energy-efficient appliances, turn off unused devices, use LED bulbs, and run heavy appliances during off-peak hours.
